title: Bug - code block popup prevents typing and selecting
excerpt: There is a popup that occurs when you use a code block in a Monday document. It prevents you from accessing the underlying text. This really has to be moved, it’s a total usability issue.

posts.author: graf (Jacob Grafenstein)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is a popup that occurs when you use a code block in a Monday document. It prevents you from accessing the underlying text. This really has to be moved, it’s a total usability issue.
